programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: When Marshall and Lily's wedding is not as they had envisioned it, Barney tries to salvage the special day.

programme.desc: At Marshall and Lily's wedding, Barney discovers that Ted and Robin have a secret that they have been hiding for weeks.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Two beautiful women show Ted that they are very attracted to him; the gang helps Ted realize that bad luck does not always come in threes.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: When Robin begins to date a single father, she bonds with his young son.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted's new girl is jealous because the story of how Ted met his friends is better than the story of how he met her.

programme.desc: Marshall gives up his dream of saving the Earth in favor of money after being courted by a lawyer (John Cho) from a corporate firm.

programme.title: The King of Staten Island
programme.desc: An aimless slacker dreams of becoming a tattoo artist while living with his mother and hanging out with his friends in Staten Island, N.Y.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Champions
programme.desc: A former minor-league basketball coach receives a court order to manage a team of players with intellectual disabilities. Despite his doubts, he soon realizes that together they can go further than they ever imagined.

programme.title: House of Villains
programme.desc: Ten new reality TV villains compete for the title of America's Ultimate Supervillain and a $200,000 cash prize; they forge alliances; the first battle royale gives a villain immunity, and the first three villains are nominated for elimination.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House of Villains
programme.desc: The Hit List nominees compete in the season's first Redemption Challenge; New York begins having psychic visions, giving her clarity on who will win the challenge; one villain manages to annoy the rest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House of Villains
programme.desc: Joel introduces the most villainous plot twist yet, which gives one lucky villain a secret advantage; the remaining villains dance it off in a disco themed Battle Royale, where alliances are revealed, and a new Supervillain is crowned.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The King of Staten Island
programme.desc: An aimless slacker dreams of becoming a tattoo artist while living with his mother and hanging out with his friends in Staten Island, N.Y.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: When the dolphin mascot of Miami's NFL team is abducted, Ace Ventura, a zany private investigator who specializes in finding missing animals, looks into the case. Soon Miami Dolphins players are kidnapped too, including star player Dan Marino, making Ace's sleuth work even more pressing. Working with Dolphins representative Melissa Robinson, Ace closes in on the culprits, but not before many ridiculous misadventures.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: Carl Allen is stuck in a rut with his negative ways. He goes to a self-help seminar and learns to unleash the power of yes. Living in the affirmative leads him to all sorts of transforming experiences; he gets a job promotion and even finds a new romance. But Carl finds that too much of anything, even positive thinking, is not necessarily a good thing.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: Imbecilic best friends Lloyd Christmas (Jim Carrey) and Harry Dunne (Jeff Daniels) stumble across a suitcase full of money left behind in Harry's car by Mary Swanson (Lauren Holly), who was on her way to the airport. The pair decide to go to Aspen, Colo., to return the money, unaware that it is connected to a kidnapping. As Harry and Lloyd -- who has fallen in love with Mary -- are pursued across the country by hired killers and police, they find both their friendship and their brains tested.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Easter Sunday
programme.desc: A man returns home to celebrate Easter with his riotous, bickering, eating, drinking, laughing, loving family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A rock-n-roller with a droopy eye wants to get back on stage; a 21-year-old who was ravaged by a predatory doctor looks for a second chance at a mommy makeover; a transgender woman inspires a doctor dance party and sings about her boobie greed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Justin Jedlica, aka the Human Ken Doll, drops by to update the doctors on his eight new leg implants; a woman who always aspired to be a telenovela actress needs a miracle after destroying her nose because of vanity; a mother loses 200 pounds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A doctor who was duped into getting silicone injections in her face suffers staggering complications; a woman who almost died from her tummy tuck seeks to erase the scars from her past; a former patient surprises the doctors with her transformation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: A social experiment that follows a couple on the brink of divorce; with the guidance of Dr. Terry, Heather Dubrow, and other experts, they separate for seven weeks and undergo a physical and mental makeover.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a woman with boobs gone bad get her sexy back and a bodybuilder get back in the gym; the doctors offer advice to a patient on her cheeky transformation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Alan tries to avoid bringing his sexy 22-year-old girlfriend to Jake's birthday party.

programme.desc: Charlie boycotts an advertising awards banquet, having lost several years in a row to his nemesis, Archie (Jon Lovitz).
